Platform

Everything in one session

⬡

Live Video Sessions

Crystal-clear WebRTC peer-to-peer video — no plugins, no lag, just you and your mentor.

⌨

Collaborative Code Editor

Real-time code sync powered by Monaco Editor. Both cursors visible, zero conflict.

⬟

Session Chat

Drop links, paste snippets, share resources — all within the session window.

◈

Session History

Every session is logged. Review code, notes and recordings any time after.
